message:
refactor(codegen): Add auto-closing helpers to constants.zig and calls.zig

- constants.zig: Added emitQuotedString, emitBytesLiteral, emitComplexCreate helpers
  and updated genConstant to use them for string, bytes, and complex number emission

- calls.zig: Added emitRuntimeCallStart, emitInitCallStart, emitPyValueFrom helpers
  and updated call sites to use them for cleaner runtime function calls and
  class initialization patterns
